sourceMovie.title: Chasing the Dragon
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Chasing the Dragon for the same reason it broke through in 2017: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a crime rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Wong Jing keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Trap House
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Chasing the Dragon clicked for you, Trap House (2025) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Chasing the Dragon?
faq.answer: Try Trap House, Rise of the Footsoldier, The Enforcer—each shares DNA with Chasing the Dragon while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Chasing the Dragon?
faq.answer: Chasing the Dragon (2017) is best described as Action, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Chasing the Dragon part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Chasing the Dragon Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
